summary: Backend testing for Arch Field feature (Iteration 83) completed successfully. All 11 tests passed. Verified: (1) POST /api/procedures with arch='Maxillary' for All on 4 stores and returns arch correctly, (2) POST /api/procedures with arch='Mandibular' for All on 6 stores arch correctly, (3) GET /api/procedures/{id} returns arch field in response, (4) Non-full-arch procedures (Single Implant) work without arch field, (5) Smart Planner generates 'Maxillary Restorative Space Analysis' title for Maxillary arch, (6) Smart Planner generates 'Mandibular Restorative Space Analysis' title for Mandibular arch, (7) Material compatibility with 5 prosthesis types works correctly, (8) PDF generation includes dynamic labels for arch condition and restorative space.
critical_code_review_comments: ProcedureCreate model at line 245 correctly defines arch as Optional[str] with max_length=20
_generate_smart_planner_report function at line 1897 correctly reads procedure.get('arch') and generates dynamic space_label based on arch value
Smart Planner interarch_space module title uses dynamic label: 'Maxillary Restorative Space' or 'Mandibular Restorative Space' or generic 'Restorative Space' based on arch value
PDF generator at lines 2325-2346 correctly implements dynamic labels: arch_cond_label and space_pdf_label based on arch value

Material compatibility module correctly evaluates 5 prosthesis types: Fixed Prosthesis, Overdentures with Individual Attachments, Overdenture with Bar Attachments, Hybrid Prosthesis with Metal Framework and Acrylic, Zirconia Hybrid Prosthesis
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Arch field feature fully tested. Key verifications: (1) arch field (Maxillary/Mandibular) is stored and returned correctly for Full Arch procedures (All on 4/6/X), (2) Smart Planner generates dynamic titles based on arch value - 'Maxillary Restorative Space Analysis' or 'Mandibular Restorative Space Analysis', (3) PDF generator uses dynamic labels for arch condition and restorative space, (4) Non-full-arch procedures work without arch field (backward compatible), (5) Material compatibility module evaluates 5 prosthesis types correctly.
verified_features: Backend: POST /api/procedures with arch='Maxillary' for All on 4 - arch stored and returned correctly - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/procedures with arch='Mandibular' for All on 6 - arch stored correctly - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/procedures/{id} returns arch field in response - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/procedures with arch='' for non-full-arch (Single Implant) - works without arch field - VERIFIED
Backend: Smart Planner with Maxillary arch + 14mm interarch produces 'Maxillary Restorative Space Analysis' title - VERIFIED
Backend: Smart Planner with Mandibular arch + 10mm interarch produces 'Mandibular Restorative Space Analysis' title - VERIFIED
Backend: Smart Planner material_compatibility with 5 prosthesis types (Feasible/Marginal/Not Feasible) - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF generation with dynamic labels for arch condition and restorative space - VERIFIED
Backend: PDF with Mandibular arch produces dynamic labels - VERIFIED
Backend: All on X procedure with Maxillary arch - VERIFIED
Backend: Smart Planner without arch uses generic 'Restorative Space' label (backward compatibility) - VERIFIED
